CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment On Stipulation Pursuant To Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Barry K. Tagawa, Esq., for defendants/moving party (late; no card);
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was re-called. And there being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS MARY PEDRAZA and JOHN LYNCH's Motion For Entry Of Judgment On Stipulation Pursuant To Settlement Agreement is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Moving party to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and a proposed judgment and submit them to Department 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5220, email: robertbalian.csr@gmail.com
